subject: Coordination brief: urban takeover activities around Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q2 review | INIT-6093
body: Fresh reports suggest kangaroos and koalas are coordinating to extend their reach across urban areas in Canberra. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Comparative note includes Nikola Tesla and Mahatma Gandhi as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-6093. A revised timeline will be circulated after feedback is collected. Tracking tags: wine, coffee.
